Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Interface ListLikeObservable<E>

Type Parameters:
E - the type of elements in the list-like structure
All Known Subinterfaces:
ListObservable<E>
All Known Implementing Classes:
LinkedListObservable
@AvailableSince("0.0.50") public interface ListLikeObservable<E>
Represents an observable list-like structure that allows modification operations such as addition, removal, and sorting while providing change notifications to observers.
See Also:

    Sort list elements by given comparator
